extraction.one_line_summary: HEALY Ben soloed to victory attacking 50km out on the penultimate climb while ROGLIC Primoz gained 14 seconds on EVENEPOEL Remco in GC group.
tactical_patterns: HEALY Ben attacked 50km out on first ascent of Salita Capuccini, proving early isolation works when breakaway fatigues.
ROGLIC Primoz exploited EVENEPOEL Remco's weakness on final climb despite INEOS duo THOMAS-HART pacing, gaining 14 seconds tactically.
DSM controlled peloton for intermediate sprint to protect MILAN Jonathan's ciclamino lead, revealing jersey defense overrides GC support.
Breakaway took 80km to establish on unclassified opening climb, suggesting teams gambled on hard finish neutralizing early moves.

rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: Won by 1:49, largest margin in 5 years, attacking 50km out shows exceptional form progression beyond spring classics.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Lost 14 seconds to ROGLIC on final climb, first visible weakness before crucial 35km TT where he's favorite.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Attacked final climb tactically to gain time before TT, now 30 seconds behind, showing recovery from early deficit.
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: neutral: Retained pink by 8 seconds despite defensive riding, vulnerable position before specialist TT stage.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Paced EVENEPOEL with HART on final climb, INEOS deploying dual GT winners as domestiques reveals GC commitment.
